# Starlight Whispers
## Scripture
"But you are a chosen people, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a people belonging to God, that you may declare the praises of him who called you out of darkness into his wonderful light." - 1 Peter 2:9

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the night sky, the twinkling stars whisper secrets of God's vast and wondrous creation. Like the stars, we are called to shine as beacons of light in a world still shrouded in darkness. The celestial ballet reminds us of our place within the grand tapestry of God's plan. Just as the stars are strategically positioned to guide and illuminate, we too are positioned by God to declare His praises and reflect His wonderful light. In this season of renewal and growth, may we allow the starlight whispers to encourage us to step into our royal priesthood, embracing our role as holy ambassadors of God's love.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the starry night sky, remind us of our calling to shine as lights in the darkness. Help us to declare Your praises and reflect Your wonderful light to a world in need. Empower us to embody our role as a royal priesthood, that we may guide and illuminate those around us, pointing them to Your love and goodness. May the starlight whispers inspire us to step boldly into our purpose, shining bright for Your glory. Amen.
